message:
feat(fnx-python): add min_cost_flow and min_cost_flow_cost Python bindings

Exposes the Rust min_cost_flow implementation to Python.

Note: The Rust implementation uses inverted demand convention
(positive=supply, negative=demand) while NetworkX uses negative=supply,
positive=demand. The existing Python wrapper in __init__.py already
implements the correct NetworkX convention and shadows these bindings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
